style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;overflow=hidden;rounded=1;shadow=1;strokeWidth=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;arcSize=3;align=center;fontFamily=Patrick Hand;fontSource=https%3A%2F%2Ffonts.googleapis.com%2Fcss%3Ffamily%3DPatrick%2BHand;strokeColor=none;" value="<h1 style="margin-top: 0px;"><font style="font-size: 20px;">REST / HTTP</font></h1><p>Request/response</p><p>Stateless</p><p>Good for: CRUD, file uploads, history fetch</p><p>Cacheble</p><p>User for: auth, user profile, group management, fetching old messages</p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="220" width="180" x="-590" y="2640" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;overflow=hidden;rounded=1;shadow=1;strokeWidth=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;arcSize=3;align=center;fontFamily=Patrick Hand;fontSource=https%3A%2F%2Ffonts.googleapis.com%2Fcss%3Ffamily%3DPatrick%2BHand;strokeColor=none;" value="<h1 style="margin-top: 0px;"><font style="font-size: 20px;">Websocket</font></h1><p>Persistence Connection</p><p>Statefull</p><p>Good for: Real time, presence, typing indicators</p><p>Not Cacheble</p><p>User for: live messages, delivery receipts, online status</p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="220" width="180" x="-311" y="2640" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<h1 style="font-family: &quot;Patrick Hand&quot;; margin-top: 0px;"><font User for: auth, user profile, group management, fetching old messages
